author: JoeFatsoman
title: Excelent but needs a bit of polishing
content:
Great app with some minor annoyances. Scrolling trough menus is a bit glitchy, adding songs to a playlist should be available from the play screen as well. When adjusting the EQ, for some reason the track will skip to a random timestamp. Also the total time sometimes is not accurate, showing 50 mins instead of 7min.
 I definitely considering buying it, but I’ll wait for the updates, for this price it should be more refined.
